message: Node started: Task: Optimize stamp placement on a grid to maximize the sum of cell values. Input: N M K: Grid dimension (N=9), number of available stamps (M=20), maximum allowed placements (K=81). Initial Board: N x N grid of integers. Stamps: M sets of 3 x 3 integer grids. State Space: Board State: N x N matrix of integers. Action: A triplet (m, i, j) where m is the stamp index (0 to M-1) and (i, j) is the top-left coordinate such that 0 <= i <= N-3 and 0 <= j <= N-3. Transition Rules: Applying action (m, i, j) updates the board: Board[r][c] = (Board[r][c] + Stamp[m][r-i][c-j]) mod 998244353 for all r in [i, i+2] and c in [j, j+2]. Objective Function: Maximize Score = Sum of all Board[r][c] for 0 <= r, c < N. Constraints: Total placements L <= K. All stamp placements must be fully contained within the N x N board. All arithmetic is performed modulo 998244353. Output Format: Line 1: L (number of placements). Next L lines: m i j (one triplet per placement). Implementation Requirements: Language: Python (main.py). Input: stdin. Output: stdout. No debug text or extra formatting in stdout.
